title: Error
description: Typed AAP error payload. Returned inside an A2A error envelope (JSON-RPC 'error' member or HTTP 'application/json' error body, per A2A spec sections 9.5 and 11.6). Buyer agents use 'code' and 'retryable' to drive client behavior; humans see 'message'.

error_id.description: Unique identifier for this error instance, suitable for support correlation (e.g. UUID).

code.description: Machine-readable error code from the AAP error vocabulary.

message.description: Human-readable error message suitable for end-user display.

retryable.description: Whether the buyer agent SHOULD retry the same request after a backoff.

details.description: Optional, code-specific details (e.g. validation failure paths). Free shape.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp at which the dealer agent generated this error (e.g. '2026-04-30T10:15:30Z'). MUST include a timezone offset (Z or ±HH:MM).
